meaning: n.[医]关节固定术,人为关节强硬术
examples: To develop a new internal fixator and new method for four-corner arthrodesis.
Objective To introduce a new technique of ankle arthrodesis with trephine by lateral approach and evaluate its clinical effects.
Arthrodesis was done with autogenous iliac bone graft or titanium cage supplemented with anterior self-lock plates in both groups.
